data.content: Implementation review failed. Required behavior says the user should be able to select a conversation from history and debug that conversation. In AgentHistoryView, the debug panel is opened from the beat-level header and HistoryDebugPanel is always bound to sessions[0] rather than a user-selected session (src/components/agent-history-view.tsx:1059-1143). That means multiple captured conversations cannot be individually chosen for debugging, which is a direct mismatch with the knot description. Test coverage does not catch this drift because the integration harness also hardcodes sessions[0] (src/components/__tests__/agent-history-view-debug-integration.test.ts:45-52). Sanity gates passed during review: bun run lint, bunx tsc --noEmit, bun run test, bun run build.
